brief_notes: Faithful but compact summary of the source paper. All numbers verified against extraction: 30-40 bp, n=14 TRF, n=7 flow-FISH, R2=0.84, 40 bp/day, 1000 bp elongation in 3 days, 24 bp/year, 14 donors aged 18-77, age cohorts (young 18-20 n=5, middle 35-65 n=6, elder >70 n=3), AUCs (0.98/0.93/0.91), accuracies (95/91/86%), 75% CRC, 20 patients, 110-120 days replicative limit, 1-3 thousand bp TRF overestimate, 1500 bp flow-FISH, TINF2 p.Gln298fs, p<2e-16. However, the writing is terse and section-heavy rather than paragraph-structured; Introduction is a single short paragraph with no Related Work; Discussion is brief; limitations are not addressed. Citations use numeric placeholders (r22, r23, r34, etc.) rather than named references. One results table for classifier; no figures. Adequate but shallow manuscript.
